# `ProjectIdea.txt` (the vision document) isn't linked from CONTRIBUTING.md

**Category:** 📚 Documentation

## Background

README.md and CLAUDE.md both point new readers to `ProjectIdea.txt` as "the north star for 'why' a feature exists." CONTRIBUTING.md — the document most likely to be a contributor's actual entry point before opening an issue or PR — never mentions it.

## Why it matters

A contributor who reads only CONTRIBUTING.md (a completely reasonable thing to do) currently has no path to the document that explains the product vision behind the roadmap they're being asked to respect.

## Proposed solution

Add one sentence and a link to `ProjectIdea.txt` in CONTRIBUTING.md's introduction, alongside the existing CLAUDE.md reference.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md links to `ProjectIdea.txt` in its introductory section

## Suggested files

`CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Difficulty

Beginner

## Estimated time

5 min

## Labels

good first issue, documentation

## Dependencies

None
